---
title: "Science Communication"
format: html
toc: true
---

## AfroBiotech Roundup

::: {#hero-heading style="text-align:center"}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.7.2/css/all.min.css">

<iframe src="https://afrobiotech.substack.com/embed" width="480" height="320" style="border:1px solid #EEE; background:white;" frameborder="0" scrolling="no">

</iframe>
:::
